scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @slopbowl/slopscore && npm run build --workspace @slopbowl/discord-bot
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @slopbowl/slopscore && npm run test --workspace @slopbowl/discord-bot
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @slopbowl/slopscore && npm run typecheck --workspace @slopbowl/discord-bot
